hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq "(^|[[:space:]])vault[[:space:]]+(write|delete|kv[[:space:]]+(put|delete|destroy|metadata)|policy[[:space:]]+(write|delete)|(auth|secrets)[[:space:]]+(enable|disable|tune)|lease[[:space:]]+revoke|token[[:space:]]+revoke|operator[[:space:]]+(unseal|seal|generate-root|rotate|rekey)|namespace[[:space:]]+(create|delete))\b"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"vault edit operation detected. Confirm before writing to or removing from the secret store.\"}}"; fi'
